name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG
description: The KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG is committed to introducing KIRAN-DESKTOP into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.

name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 代码仓库列表
description: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 维护的 64 个代码仓库，涵盖 桌面与图形界面 领域

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG（Special Interest Group，特别兴趣小组）负责 The KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG is committed to introducing KIRAN-DESKTOP into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.。该 SIG 共有 5 名核心成员，维护 64 个代码仓库，属于 桌面与图形界面 领域。

mainEntity.name: 如何参与 openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG？

acceptedAnswer.text: 参与 openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 的方式：1）向相关仓库（如 openeuler/kiran-desktop、openeuler/kiran-cc-daemon、openeuler/kiran-session-manager）提交 Pull Request；2）订阅邮件列表 sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP@openeuler.org；3）参加 SIG 定期工作会议，会议信息见 openEuler 官网活动日历。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 包含哪些代码仓库？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 共维护 64 个代码仓库，主要包括：openeuler/kiran-desktop、openeuler/kiran-cc-daemon、openeuler/kiran-session-manager 等。完整列表见 https://www.openeuler.org/zh/sig/sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 的 Maintainer 是谁？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG 现有 4 名 Maintainer，包括：ShiYong、TangJie、LiuXinHao。Maintainer 负责代码最终审核与合并。
